issues.issue: grammar pattern 'nya-possessive-suffix' has no contrast_pair candidate
issues.fix: Add a contrast_pair distinguishing -nya possessive from -mu or -ku

issues.issue: grammar pattern 'nya-possessive-suffix' has no sentence_transformation candidate
issues.fix: Add a sentence_transformation asking to rewrite a sentence using -nya possessive

issues.issue: grammar pattern 'nya-possessive-suffix' has no constrained_translation candidate
issues.fix: Add a constrained_translation requiring use of -nya as possessive suffix

issues.issue: grammar pattern 'nya-adjective-nominalizer' has no contrast_pair candidate
issues.fix: Add a contrast_pair distinguishing -nya nominalizer from -nya possessive

issues.issue: grammar pattern 'nya-adjective-nominalizer' has no constrained_translation candidate
issues.fix: Add a constrained_translation requiring -nya as adjective nominalizer (e.g. translate 'the length of this road is 5 km')

issues.issue: grammar pattern 'time-adverbs-basic' has no sentence_transformation candidate
issues.fix: Add a sentence_transformation changing tense via time adverb substitution

issues.issue: grammar pattern 'time-adverbs-basic' has no constrained_translation candidate
issues.fix: Add a constrained_translation requiring a specific time adverb

issues.issue: grammar pattern 'time-place-word-order' has no contrast_pair candidate
issues.fix: Add a contrast_pair with correct vs incorrect time/place positioning (e.g. 'Saya sekarang makan' vs 'Sekarang saya makan')

issues.issue: grammar pattern 'time-place-word-order' has no sentence_transformation candidate
issues.fix: Add a sentence_transformation asking to move a misplaced time adverb to a correct position
